lastReleaseMessage: Doc and config follow-up to the v0.14.4 hardening pass. DESIGN.md api sections now describe the shipped behavior: rules validation and real change counts, preview LIKE escaping, transactions_live read paths, clamped analytics params, guardCents on budgets, single-query stats with archived count. Dependabot now ignores react-family major bumps so react and react-dom can only move as a pair, closing the mismatch that PR 7 introduced.

barRaise.topFinding: First deep full pass since 2026-07-14, and it found live breakage the two carry-forward runs could not see. The Plaid sync insert at plaid/sync.ts:102 targets ON CONFLICT(plaid_transaction_id) while db.ts:293 creates that index as PARTIAL, which fails at prepare time against the project's own SQLite driver: every sync page carrying a new transaction throws, gets swallowed into status='error', and never advances the cursor, so Plaid-sourced rows have never once landed and the plaid/ module has no tests to say so. Alongside it, the CI advisory gate is dead (npm retired the endpoint pnpm audit calls, so security.yml now hard-fails on transport) and Dependabot alerts turn out to have never been enabled despite three docs asserting coverage. The chronic bulk-delete data-loss path is still unsnapshotted at 11 runs open, and the queue's stale-14d rule is on track to silently auto-archive it on 2026-07-18. Health drops 81 to 73 and actions jump 31 to 81, but that is the measurement catching up, not a two-day regression: 28 of the previous 31 findings were never actually enqueued because the synthesis deduped against a list it writes itself. No hard rule is breached; all four hard_rule_checks pass.

actions.title: Fix the Plaid sync ON CONFLICT target at plaid/sync.ts:102 to carry the partial-index predicate, and add a behavioral test that prepares the real statement against the real schema.

Rewrite the bar-raise enqueue dedupe (waves/05_meta_synthesis.md:111) to consult only the live work queue, never the openFindings list the same step writes, and backfill the 28 dropped Budget findings.
Gate the queue's stale-no-action-14d auto-archive rule so HIGH or P0/P1 items escalate to blocked-on-user instead of being disposed of; the HIGH bulk-delete item hits day 14 on 2026-07-18.
Add a post-write gate to the synthesis asserting every openFindings id resolves to a queue item, and print an Auto-enqueued / Auto-enqueue FAILED line in the report.
Wrap POST /api/transactions/bulk-delete (server.ts:534-544) in createBackup("pre-bulk-delete") and return 503 backup_failed on snapshot failure.
Apply Plaid removed before added within each sync page and give the Plaid insert a natural-key conflict path so the pending-to-posted transition upgrades the row instead of rolling back the page.
Add an occurrence ordinal to the transactions natural key (db.ts:120) so a second genuine identical same-day charge inserts, and flip dedupe.test.ts:68-71 to assert the twin survives.
Derive the Plaid takeover archive window from each item's real earliest_available_date server-side and treat the client value as advisory.
Replace the dead pnpm audit step in .github/workflows/security.yml with a lockfile scanner (osv-scanner) now that npm retired the endpoint and the gate hard-fails on transport.

Enable Dependabot alerts and automated security fixes on the repo, then correct SECURITY.md:26, docs/SECURITY_POLICY.md:68 and .github/dependabot.yml:3, which all assert coverage that has never been on.
Add a keep-at-least-3-newest floor to pruneOldBackups (backup.ts:100-116) and a periodic boot-time snapshot, so the backup directory can never drain to zero as both live ones have.
Scope the yesandeverything.com CORS origin to the probe route only and restrict the /* mount to the two loopback dev origins, then correct the D-005 rationale at docs/DECISIONS.md:137.
Correct docs/PRE_INSTALL_CHECKLIST.md:37,40 to run the keytar key-export from apps/api, since the command fails MODULE_NOT_FOUND at the cwd the checklist prescribes before an irreversible finalize.
Rewrite the docs/PLAID_PHASE2_RUNBOOK.md rollback section, which restores a file its own step 4 finalize deletes.
Add an enqueue-reconciliation step to the carry-forward path (per_project.md:38) and drop 'no queue movement' from the skip-gate conditions, so a starved queue stops reading as a quiet project.
Spend one attended Budget release draining this finding batch, starting with the bulk-delete snapshot, rather than booking another carry-forward run.
Port the sibling $existingFindings preservation pattern into write-dashboard-status.ps1:205 so the release stops clobbering audit findings counts to a 0/0/0 literal.
Add D-009 through D-012 BLOCK entries plus plaid/, workers/ and secrets/ hazard sections to the YaB hazard catalog, which predates v0.13.0.
Add an integration test that seeds a keyed DB, calls createBackup(), reopens the snapshot with the same key and asserts integrity_check plus matching row counts.
Re-grade bar-raise-2026-07-04-yab-bulk-delete-no-backup to P1/high and make the synthesis re-grade a queue item when its finding severity changes.
Strip the full alphanumeric token after an aggregator prefix in normalizeMerchant (merchant.ts:14) so AMZN Mktp US, SQ and TST descriptors collapse to one merchant and one rule.
Correct the factually wrong CORS rationale in docs/DECISIONS.md:137, which claims loopback binding prevents cross-origin reads.
Rewrite scripts/README.md:65, which still instructs a blind rm -f .git/index.lock that git-guard.ps1:6-11 identifies as the cause of prior .git corruption.

Make db.ts injectable (or vi.mock it) and add a behavioral test asserting runImport throws BackupFailedError and inserts zero rows when createBackup rejects; D-007 currently has no behavioral coverage.
Set baseOptions.timeout on the Plaid Configuration and pass AbortSignal.timeout to the three relay fetches; no outbound call in the project sets a timeout.
Cap the Plaid transactionsSync pagination loop (sync.ts:56-71) at a page limit and break with a logged event when next_cursor stops advancing.
Make previewTakeover count with COUNT(*) so the confirmed number matches what commitTakeover archives.
Capture prior normalized_merchant values (or snapshot) for merge-merchant and expose an undo in the Transactions toast.
Wrap the router outlet in a React ErrorBoundary that renders a reload affordance and posts to /api/error-log; a render throw currently blanks the whole tree.
Add an in-app restore-from-backup route, or promote the manual-swap procedure to DECISIONS.md and drop the dead pre-restore reason from backup.ts.
Add .plaid-token and .plaid-link-token to the secret-exposure check's SENSITIVE list and to secret_exposure_paths in .project-context.json.
Add a .catch to the Dashboard hero Promise.all (Dashboard.tsx:56-91) so a failed endpoint renders a TileError with retry instead of pinning the StatCards on a permanent skeleton.
Route categorize and undo failures through useToast in Categorize.tsx:89-91,108-110 instead of console.error alone.
Wrap the roughly fifteen unguarded mutation handlers in try/catch and surface the message through toast, starting with bulk delete, merge and rollback.
Add a .catch on the Transactions and Insights loaders so a dead API stops rendering as an authoritative 'No transactions match.'
Wrap the rule-apply loops in rules-engine.ts:102-113 and :128-138 in a single db.transaction() so categorization commits once instead of per row.
Move the nine hand-mirrored wire types from apps/web/src/api.ts into packages/shared/src/types.ts so the compiler enforces the Plaid, goals, stats and backup contracts.
Extract the validated date-parse logic from generic-csv.ts into one shared module and have statement-text.ts call it, so impossible dates stop entering posted_date silently.
Route rule amountMin/amountMax through guardCents in the POST /api/rules, PATCH /api/rules/:id and categorize-merchant handlers per D-003.
Report an inspectable dedupe count so a dropped twin charge is visible rather than silently folded into the duplicates tally.
Extract the five route sections that sit below serve() in server.ts:1256 into per-domain modules mounted before the bind; the BACKLOG gate (post-milestone) fired when M6 closed.
logEvent on a failed Plaid item removal (items.ts:39) and keep the row as revoke_failed instead of deleting it, so a live token is not silently orphaned behind a green toast.
Branch on r.status in PlaidConnectFlow.tsx:134 so a failed first sync stops rendering as a green Connected toast.

Propagate the v0.14.3 relay disclosure to docs/privacy.md, docs/SECURITY_POLICY.md:9,31, FirstLaunchConsent.tsx:74 and the YaE budget security page, which all still assert no operator-run destination exists.
Call unregisterRelay for every active item before the factory-reset handler closes the DB, so the relay mapping cannot outlive the key needed to remove it.
Add a merchant_aliases table applied inside normalizeMerchant and have merge-merchant write the alias, so a merge survives the next import.
Extend the store-number strip in merchant.ts:15 to handle # without a leading space and bare trailing digit runs, and add the missing test cases.
Extend the createBackup-then-503 gate to merge-merchant and Plaid applyRemoved so the snapshot contract keys off destructiveness rather than off the import route.
Drop the LIMIT from the takeover preview's count or have commitTakeover archive exactly the preview's id set; the code comment claiming query parity is false.
Backfill finding_id on the six YaB queue items, rename the stray detail field to prompt, and normalize the project tag split across yab and budget.
Normalize the blocked Plaid takeover item to blocked-on-user and extend queue-triage-nightly to report blocked items, which currently fall out of every surface.
Add a dashboard_identifier field to .project-context.json and have per_project.md read the status JSON from it, instead of resolving the non-existent YaB.json from the short id.
Normalize the work-queue project field to one value for this project and rewrite the split-tag items through scripts/queue-edit.ps1.
Namespace queue dedupe on the (project, finding_id) pair; bare ids like data-integrity-01 already collide with Skylight and Hordes rows.
Add title and finding_id to the work-queue-runner item schema and map actions[].title into them on every enqueue.
Route release.ps1 Stamp-Version's DESIGN.md, package.json and CHANGELOG.md writes through the tmp + Move-Item + readback + retry helper already proven in write-dashboard-status.ps1:224-245.
Add a dashboard-refresh step to audit-budget-nightly that stamps the newest CANONICAL_AUDIT into Budget.json; the pointer froze at the 2026-07-04 release and names a deleted file.
Rewrite scripts/README.md and the release.ps1:3-8 header to match the shipped 0-6 step order, and correct the BACKLOG lint overclaim to typecheck plus vitest.
Enqueue a real adr-promoter item for each tension past runsSeen 3 instead of printing a flag; three Budget tensions qualify and none ever has.
Extract the Transactions row into a React.memo'd component and patch the changed row locally instead of calling reload() on every category change.
Drop the 2>&1 redirects on the three git calls in write-dashboard-status.ps1:254,263,271 so a real YaE push failure becomes distinguishable from the documented false alarm.
Add a server test pinning the launcher probe contract (GET / answering ok/app/version with the CORS echo) so future CORS narrowing must consciously keep it working.
Make scripts/yab.cmd self-locate via %~dp0.. so the launcher page's headline instruction works outside Kane's own path.
Delete docs/landing-page.html or repoint it at the deployed page; it is a 659-line-drifted parallel implementation documenting an abandoned yab:// flow.
Amend the restore procedure at Settings.tsx:173 to require removing the -wal and -shm sidecars, which otherwise replay stale frames into the restored file.
Change the Plaid runbook's force-kill stop to a graceful signal and make migrate-sqlcipher.ts:82 snapshot via a checkpointed db.backup() rather than copyFileSync.
Merge dependabot PR #12 (vitest 4) to realign the test runner with vite 8, and add a vite/vitest pairing guard beside the react-family rules.
Drain the five open dependabot PRs saturating the configured cap, starting with #12.
logEvent on relay drain and register failures (relay.ts) and surface registerRelay's false return at link.ts:82, so a dead relay stops reading as an empty queue.
Reject a missing centsPerMonth on the budgets PUT with a 400 instead of letting guardCents coerce it to a silent $0 target.
Add logEvent to the two Plaid snapshot-fail catches at server.ts:1412,1426 so a recurring backup failure is not silent for takeover and restore.
Correct the YaE budget privacy page's 'the relay stores nothing' claim and qualify the surrounding absolute no-operator-system statements.
Delete the phantom Budget Resources Bot row from CLAUDE.md:117; no standard entry, no file and no script backs it.
Change the git-guard.ps1:62 recovery hint to name the git-unstick skill instead of the nonexistent unstick-git.ps1.
Have dedupe.test.ts build its in-memory schema from the real migrate() so schema drift and prepare-time breakage fail the suite.
Make hazard_catalog an absolute path in .project-context.json:103; the declared relative form does not resolve from the project root.
Relocate the 33 inline db.prepare sites in server.ts into the domain modules that already own those tables, leaving routes as thin adapters.
Fix the dashboard's bar-raise report link, which resolves a YaB-local path against the YaE site root and 404s.
Move handler-audit-nightly out of YaB's scheduled_tasks; it is a portfolio routine that attributes to Everything and writes outside this repo.
Drop /budget/ from the STATIC sitemap array in update-project-pages.mjs:109; the page is noindex and the deploy rewrites any hand fix.
Extract the atomic-write helper into a shared function so Stamp-Version and the CHANGELOG writer stop using bare Set-Content on the FUSE mount.

deferred.title: Engage SQLCipher on the live DB; the file is still plaintext and D-008's migration has never been run.

deferred.reason: blocked on Nick answer; every strategic call about YaB depends on it

deferred.reason: deferred migration; v4 is a manual breaking upgrade
